title: Oscars 2026 Winners: Best Production Design - Hollywood Reporter
text: Frankenstein won the Oscar for Best Production Design at the 98th Academy Awards ceremony held on March 15, 2026. The Netflix film's production design team consisted of Tamara Deverell (Production Design) and Shane Vieau (Set Decoration). This was one of three awards that Frankenstein secured during the evening, along with wins in costume design and makeup and hairstyling. The film competed against other nominees including Hamnet, Marty Supreme, One Battle After Another, and Sinners in this category.
